meditation.name: Breathing Meditation
meditation.description: Focus on your breath, inhaling deeply through your nose and exhaling slowly to calm the mind.
instructions: Sit or lie down in a relaxed position
Count breaths: inhale (1), exhale (2), up to 10, then repeat
When mind wanders, gently return to breath

meditation.name: Body Scan Meditation
meditation.description: Systematically focus on each part of your body, releasing tension and promoting relaxation.
instructions: Start by focusing on your toes
Slowly move attention up through each body part
End by bringing awareness to whole body

meditation.name: Loving-Kindness Meditation
meditation.description: Cultivate feelings of love and compassion through guided visualization and positive intentions.
instructions: Start by directing loving-kindness to yourself
Repeat phrases: 'May I be happy, may I be healthy'

meditation.name: Walking Meditation
meditation.description: Practice mindfulness while walking, focusing on each step and the sensations of movement.
instructions: Find a quiet path (indoor or outdoor)
Focus on the sensation of each step
Notice lifting, moving, placing of foot
If mind wanders, return to walking

meditation.name: Guided Visualization
meditation.description: Use mental imagery to create peaceful, positive experiences that promote relaxation and healing.
instructions: Stay in this place for 10-15 minutes

meditation.name: Mantra Meditation
meditation.description: Repeat a word, phrase, or sound to focus the mind and achieve deep relaxation.
instructions: Focus on the sound and vibration
When mind wanders, return to mantra
